title: Daily nudge for stale ready nodes
description: Every morning, find DAGs that still have a ready node and were created more than 2 days ago, draft a short nudge for each, and drop a follow-up so the backlog cannot rot silently. See ~/.claude/rules/common/code-as-furniture.md.

steps.prompt: Draft a one-line nudge reminding me that this work has been sitting ready for over two days. Be specific about the goal and direct about the next move.
